landing.badge: Prepare well for your car exam in Kinyarwanda
landing.title: Study road rules, practice, pass the exam.
landing.description: Your practice and exam platform built like Duolingo, but focused on road rules and signs.
landing.practiceDesc: Learn signs, road rules, and behavior while preparing for the exam.
landing.modeDesc: A level designed to help you study a lot.

quickPractice.title: Quick Practice
quickPractice.description: 20 questions per session, quick answers, no time limit.

certifiedExam.title: Certified Exam
certifiedExam.description: 20 min, no feedback, results provided clearly and saved.

admin.title: Administrator
admin.description: Administrator can manage question bank and user reports.

auth.title: Sign in or register
auth.subtitle: Choose your side
auth.description: Choose "Student" if you're ready for practice and exams, or "Admin" if you're managing questions and decisions.

benefits.title: Benefits
benefits.student: Student: start practice, take exams, view reports.
benefits.admin: Admin: manage question bank, modify questions, view user behavior.

dashboard.description: This is your practice and exam dashboard. Choose what you want to do then continue studying.
dashboard.examReadyText: You've completed 5 practice sessions. You're ready to take the real exam!
dashboard.suggestionText: You've completed 5 practice sessions! Ready for the real exam?

resultsCard.title: View Results
resultsCard.description: See how you've performed in your exams.

results.title: Exam Results
results.subtitle: Here's how you performed on your latest exam
results.feedbackPassed: Great job! You passed the exam. Keep up the good work!
results.feedbackFailed: Don't worry! Review the incorrect answers and try again. Practice makes perfect.

exam.title: Exam Mode
exam.answeredSummary: You have answered {{count}} out of {{total}} questions.
exam.submitIncomplete: You can still go back to answer unanswered questions.

practice.title: Practice Mode
practice.subtitle: Test your knowledge with 20 questions
practice.greatJob: Great job! Moving to next question...

review.title: Review Mode
review.subtitle: Review your most recent exam answers
review.noExams: No recent exams to review. Start your first exam to see answers.
